known_limitations: Facebook groups are NOT indexed by web search engines — all 30 group URLs require operator verification inside Facebook
All group URLs are marked url_confirmed: false — operator must search each group name in Facebook
Member counts are estimates based on media reports and typical Serbian FB group sizes
Group existence is based on standard Serbian FB naming conventions and media-confirmed community types
No Facebook automation was used — agent cannot browse facebook.com
This is a search map — the operator executes all Facebook actions manually
Groups may have changed names, merged, or become inactive since last media coverage
